# HEIF Test Fixture

`RGB_8__29x100.heif` is copied without modification from Pillow-Heif:

- Repository: https://github.com/bigcat88/pillow_heif
- Commit: `4366788c5eff15cf3d3c66d262224dac27f8efc4`
- Source path: `tests/images/heif/RGB_8__29x100.heif`

The fixture is included only for automated compatibility testing of the
HEIF decoding and JPEG normalization pipeline.
